title: Independent audit of the overnight operator MVP
mission: Independently audit the N+6.19A overnight operator MVP branch. Verify the clipboard relay never pastes or submits, the operator queue blocks every blocked task type, the repo execution sandbox only touches allowlisted repos and clones into the sandbox path, no cloned repo contents are committed, no secrets are present, feature flags default false, and the global example config keeps only telegram_status_commands_enabled true. Return a clear verdict.
files_allowed: read-only: the entire feature branch diff and all committed N+6.19A files
files_forbidden: no edits to the implementation branch
expected_output: A CLEAN PASS or BLOCKED verdict with specific findings and line references.
safety_rules: Do not push or merge main.
Read-only review; make no functional code changes.
